title: Terminal packaging; full Refraction Chamber world design; --rt-* CSS namespace
public_claim: Refraction Chamber final handoff is a Red Team / MuranoOS chamber package with namespace, activation, tribunal, graph, and memory design.
distinctive_mechanism: It organizes the chamber through a three-phase MuranoOS path: chamber activation, durable workspace, packet tribunal, refraction-graph calibration, shadow memory, and export surfaces.
use_value: It matters because it preserves a full adversarial-review room design rather than a loose red-team note.
